title: DFU - Low Battery - Checking DFU pop up if at least one earbud is at low battery
scenario: DFU blocked with low battery pop-up when one or both earbuds are below 5% on Device Settings > Software Update screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Ensure at least one earbud has battery level less than 5% (right earbud low, left earbud low, or both low)
Attempt to start a Device Firmware Update (DFU) by tapping the update button/option
Observe the pop-up message displayed on screen
expected: A pop-up message appears: "Update currently not available, please try back later". After tapping "OK", the user is returned to Device Settings > Software Update screen.
